empty.title: No results
empty.desc: Try fewer filters or a broader search.

apply.title: Apply to {job}
apply.name: Full name
apply.screening: A few questions from the company
apply.successDesc: The company received your application. Track its status from your account.
apply.error: Couldn't send. Check your details and try again.
apply.cvSub: We read your CV and fill the form for you. You just confirm.
apply.cvUploadHint: PDF or Word · up to 5 MB
apply.parsingHint: Extracting name, experience and skills · nothing published
apply.manual: I'd rather fill it in by hand →
apply.autofillBanner: We filled it from your CV
apply.autofillHint: Check everything's right and adjust if needed.
apply.addSkillPlaceholder: Add a skill and press Enter
apply.noSkills: No skills yet. Type them below or tap a suggestion.
apply.messagePlaceholder: Tell them why you're a fit…
apply.screeningIntro: {company} asks you to answer this for {job}. It only takes a moment.
apply.doneDesc: {company} received your profile for {job}. We'll write to {email} with any updates.
apply.next1: Track the status from My account, with proactive feedback at each stage.
apply.next2: With your CV loaded, your next application is one tap.
apply.acctTitle: Create your account to track your application
apply.acctSub: Save your profile and follow your applications. Just set a password.
apply.acctSigninSub: That email is already registered. Sign in to link this application.
apply.acctExists: That email already has an account. Sign in to continue.
apply.acctPwHint: Password must be at least 8 characters.

account.title: My account
account.completeHint: A complete profile gets more replies from companies.
account.headline: Professional headline
account.emptyApplications: You haven't applied to any jobs yet.
account.emptyAlerts: No alerts. Create one to get matching new jobs.
account.emptyAbout: Tell companies who you are, what you have built, and what kind of role you want.
account.emptyExperience: No experience imported from your resume yet.
account.emptyEducation: No education imported from your resume yet.
account.emptyLanguages: No languages imported from your resume yet.
account.emailNewsDesc: New jobs that match your profile
account.weeklyDigestDesc: A Monday email with the most relevant updates
account.profileVisibleDesc: Let companies find you for matching roles
account.applicationsDeferredText: Stage detail, feedback, and actions depend on the applications endpoint Pista A is building.
account.completeDoneHint: You can now apply in one tap.
account.emptyLinks: Add your portfolio, LinkedIn or other links.

auth.signinSub: Sign in to track your applications and alerts.
auth.signupTitle: Create your account and find work
auth.signupSub: One profile, all your applications and alerts in one place.
auth.name: Name
auth.perk: You'll build your AI profile in 2 minutes, apply in one tap and get alerts for jobs that fit.
auth.terms: By continuing you accept TalentOS's Terms and Privacy Policy.
auth.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.panelTitle: One profile. Every company in Venezuela.
auth.perkProfileDesc: Upload your CV and your profile builds itself in 2 minutes.
auth.perkOneTapDesc: No more filling forms on every job.
auth.perkAlertsDesc: We ping you when the right role opens.

assistant.title: Job assistant
assistant.greeting: Hi! I'm your search assistant. Tell me what job you're after in your own words — field, city, salary, work mode — and I'll bring you the best matches. I only search: I never post or share anything.
assistant.empty: I couldn't find jobs for that right now. Try broadening your search.
assistant.error: I couldn't process your search. Please try again.
assistant.cap3: See your fit for each job
assistant.cap1Desc: Area, city, salary and modality in plain language.
assistant.cap2Desc: Apply without leaving the chat, with your profile.
assistant.cap3Desc: Scores how well you match, based on your profile.
assistant.railIntro: Tell me what you want and I bring real jobs. I never publish or share anything.
assistant.interpretedLead: Here's what I understood from your search.

builder.title: Build your profile with AI
builder.intro: Tell me what you do and in 2 minutes I'll build your profile. You can adjust everything after.
builder.introUpdate: Update your profile and CV to receive better job offers.
builder.modality: How do you want to work?
builder.pitch: In one line, what makes you great?
builder.pitchPlaceholder: e.g. I design complex flows with research and scalable systems.
builder.cvQuestion: Got a CV? Upload it and I'll use it as base — you can still edit everything.
builder.cvQuestionUpdate: Want to update your CV? Upload it here to refresh your profile.
builder.disclaimer: AI proposes · you confirm and publish
builder.doneDesc: Generated from what you told me. Edit whatever you like.
builder.headline: Suggested headline
builder.error: I couldn't generate the profile. Please try again.
builder.previewAboutNotice: Will be written when you generate your profile.
builder.cvUploadBig: Upload your CV and I build your profile
builder.cvUploadHint: PDF or text · I parse it, you confirm
builder.parsingReassure: Extracting experience and skills · nothing published
builder.completeMissing: Add experience, education and languages (or upload your CV) to reach 100%.
